---
name: Model Request
about: Suggest a new Sequencer Model for this Package
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

- [ ] What is the sequencer? E.g., Illumina HiSeq 1000
  - [ ] Does it have a website? E.g., <https://support.illumina.com/sequencing/sequencing_instruments/hiseq_1000.html>.
- [ ] I am sure it is not a long-read sequencer -- Do not request support for models like Oxford Nanopore, PacBio Sequel/Revio/Vega, or DNBSEQ-G400ER.
- [ ] The model have a static read length. E.g., PE100 or SE100.
- [ ] I have data.
  - [ ] The data is publicly accessible on [NCBI SRA](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/sra), [EBI ENA](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ena/browser/), [DDBJ](https://www.ddbj.nig.ac.jp/index-e.html), or [NGDC](https://ngdc.cncb.ac.cn/). If so, please provide the accession.
  - [ ] The data is not trimmed; That is, read length is a static number instead of a distribution.
